    }

    // Commit the transaction.
    auto commit_result = transaction | sqlgen::commit;
    if (!commit_result.is_ok()) {
        transaction->rollback();
        return false;
    }

<answer>```cpp
#pragma once

#include <sqlgen.hpp>
#include <sqlgen/sqlite.hpp>
#include <vector>

namespace analyze_temporal_data {

struct Event {
  sqlgen::PrimaryKey<int> event_id;
  std::string event_name;
  sqlgen::Timestamp<"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S"> start_time;
  std::optional<sqlgen::Timestamp<"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S">> end_time;
  sqlgen::Timestamp<"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S"> created_at;
};

struct TemporalAnalysis {
  int event_id;
  std::string event_name;
  int start_day;
  int start_month;
  int start_year;
  int start_hour;
  int start_minute;
  int start_second;
  int start_weekday;
  int64_t start_epoch;
  std::optional<double> duration_days;
};

std::vector<TemporalAnalysis> analyze_temporal_data (const std::vector<Event>& events)  {
  using namespace sqlgen::literals;

  // Connect to the database
  auto conn_result = sqlgen::sqlite::connect("test_db.sqlite");
  if (!conn_result.is_ok()) {
    throw std::runtime_error(conn_result.error().what());
  }
  auto conn = conn_result.value();

  // Write the events to the database
  auto write_result = sqlgen::write(*conn, events);
  if (!write_result.is_ok()) {
    throw std::runtime_error(write_result.error().what());
  }

  // Build the query
  auto query = sqlgen::select_from<Event>(
       "event_id"_c,
       "event_name"_c,
       sqlgen::day("start_time"_c).as<"start_day">(),
       sqlgen::month("start_time"_c).as<"start_month">(),
       sqlgen::year("start_time"_c).as<"start_year">(),
       sqlgen::hour("start_time"_c).as<"start_hour">(),
       sqlgen::minute("start_time"_c).as<"start_minute">(),
       sqlgen::second("start_time"_c).as<"start_second">(),
       sqlgen::weekday("start_time"_c).as<"start_weekday">(),
       sqlgen::unixepoch("start_time"_c).as<"start_epoch">(),
       sqlgen::days_between("start_time"_c, "end_time"_c).as<"duration_days">()
  ) | sqlgen::where("end_time"_c.is_not_null()) | sqlgen::to<std::vector<TemporalAnalysis>>;

  // Execute the query
  auto result = query(*write_result.value());
  if (!result.is_ok()) {
    throw std::runtime_error(result.error().what());
  }

  return result.value();
}

}  // namespace analyze_temporal_data
```</answer>

  sqlgen::write(conn, friendships);

  // Define column references for the query
  auto u1_user_id = sqlgen::Col<"user_id", "u1">{};
  auto u1_username = sqlgen::Col<"username", "u1">{};
  auto u1_city = sqlgen::Col<"city", "u1">{};

  auto u2_user_id = sqlgen::Col<"user_id", "u2">{};
  auto u2_username = sqlgen::Col<"username", "u2">{};
  auto u2_city = sqlgen::Col<"city", "u2">{};

  auto f_user_id1 = sqlgen::Col<"user_id1", "f">{};
  auto f_user_id2 = sqlgen::Col<"user_id2", "f">{};

  // Build the query for same-city non-friends recommendation
  auto query = sqlgen::select_from<User, "u1">(u1_username, u2_username)
    | sqlgen::inner_join<User, "u2">(u1_city == u2_city && u1_user_id < u2_user_id)
    | sqlgen::where(!sqlgen::exists(sqlgen::select_from<Friendship, "f">(
        (f_user_id1 == u1_user_id && f_user_id2 == u2_user_id) ||
        (f_user_id1 == u2_user_id && f_user_id2 == u1_user_id)
      )));

  // Execute query and convert results
  auto results = query(conn);
  std::vector<FriendConnection> connections;
  
  for (const auto& row : results) {
    connections.push_back(FriendConnection{
      .user1_name = row[0].value<std::string>(),
      .user2_name = row[1].value<std::string>()
    });
  }

  return connections;
}

}  // namespace analyze_social_network
```</answer>

bool update_inventory_stock(const std::unordered_map<int, int>& received) {
  using namespace sqlgen;
  using namespace sqlgen::literals;
  auto conn_res = sqlite::connect("test_db.sqlite");
  if (!conn_res) return false;
  auto conn = conn_res.value();

  // Create the table
  auto create_res = create_table<Product>(conn);
  if (!create_res) return false;

  // Begin transaction
  auto txn_res = begin_transaction(conn);
  if (!txn_res) return false;
  auto txn = txn_res.value();

  // For each product, read the current stock, update it, and then write it back

    // Read the current product

    auto products = product_res(conn);
    if (!products) {
      // If the product does not exist, we might want to return an error?
      // But the problem does not specify. We'll assume it exists.
      return false;
    }
    if (products->empty()) {
      return false;
    }
    Product current_product = (*products)[0];

    // Update the stock
    current_product.stock += qty;

    // Write the updated product back
    std::vector<Product> updated_products{current_product};
    auto write_res = write(txn, updated_products.begin(), updated_products.end());
    if (!write_res) {
      return false;
    }
  }

  // Commit the transaction
  auto commit_res = commit(txn);
  return commit_res.has_value();
}
